name: CLX - MGA Insurance Advisor Reviews v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. advisor session. Returns all policy_reviews assigned to advisor with optional filters: review_type, status, priority. Includes video render details for inline preview/play.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const ctx = $json; let url = 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/policy_reviews?vertical_id=eq.insurance&select=*'; if (ctx.user_role === 'advisor' || ctx.user_role === 'sub_agent') { url += '&advisor_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.advisor_id); } if (ctx.review_type) url += '&review_type=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.review_type); if (ctx.status) url += '&status=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.status); if (ctx.priority) url += '&priority=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(ctx.priority); url += '&order=due_date.asc&limit=500'; return url; })() }}
